title: Invoices

sinceLastInvoice.pickCustomer: Pick a customer to anchor the range to their last invoice.
sinceLastInvoice.firstInvoice: No prior invoice for this customer — including everything uninvoiced.
sinceLastInvoice.previousEnd: Anchored to the day after the previous invoice's service period ({date}).

by_project.label: By project
by_project.help: One line per project — the typical format customers expect.

by_task.label: By task
by_task.help: One line per category — useful when scope-of-work is task-based.

by_person.label: By person
by_person.help: One line per consultant — surfaces who did the work.

detailed.label: Detailed
detailed.help: One line per time entry — full transparency.

preview.heading: Preview

empty.title: No matching entries
empty.help: Adjust the date range or pick a different customer.
empty.allFiltered: {count, plural, =1 {This customer has 1 uninvoiced entry, but none fall in the selected range.} other {This customer has # uninvoiced entries, but none fall in the selected range.}}
empty.zeroForCustomer: This customer has no uninvoiced billable entries.

orphans.message: {count, plural, =1 {1 uninvoiced entry sits outside this date range — likely a stragger from before the last invoice.} other {# uninvoiced entries sit outside this date range — likely straggers from before the last invoice.}}

preview.fullOpenAria: Preview the full invoice before creating
preview.fullModalSubtitle: What this draft will look like once created. Final PDF includes branding and totals layout.
preview.fullNoLines: No line items in the current selection.

new.submitDisabledHint: Add billable entries to enable. Pick a customer and a date range that includes uninvoiced work.

noInvoices: No invoices yet. Create one from unbilled time entries.
selectClientDescription: Choose a customer to see their unbilled time entries.
noUnbilledTime: No unbilled time entries for this customer.

actions.voidConfirmInputLabel: Type the invoice number ({number}) to confirm
actions.deleteConfirmInputLabel: Type the invoice number ({number}) to confirm deletion

payment.title: Record payment
payment.formAriaLabel: Record a payment against this invoice

paidDate.multiPaymentTooltip: This invoice has {count} payment records — edit the individual payment rows in the activity log below.
paidDate.formAriaLabel: Correct the paid date for this invoice
paidDate.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this being corrected? Persisted in the audit trail.
paidDate.reasonMin: {current}/{min} — a longer reason is required for the audit trail.

statusDescription.void: This invoice has been voided and cannot be collected.
statusDescription.overdue: Payment for this invoice is past due.

activity.title: Invoice history
activity.bounced: Bounced — recipient mail server rejected delivery.

bulkSelectHint: Select rows to mark paid in bulk
bulkMarkPaidIneligibleHint: Only sent or overdue invoices can be marked paid in bulk. Narrow the selection.
bulkPaidToast: {count, plural, one {1 invoice marked paid} other {# invoices marked paid}}
